steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0026_phase2_abc_runtime_n147_for_rq1_rq5 branch from main and write step plan.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify all 7 dependency tasks are completed and produce required libraries/aggregators.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize the mandatory task folder structure with research/, plan/, results/, assets/, etc.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: literature coverage already produced by t0017_lit_survey_phase2_priors and t0025 synthesis.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external web research required; internal libraries already cover what we need.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Survey libraries from t0006/t0010/t0021/t0022 and aggregators from t0011 to plan harness wiring.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan.md: instance manifest, harness orchestration, judge wiring, cost reestimation, risks.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local Anthropic-API-only run, no remote compute needed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build instance manifest, run A/B/C variants on N=147, run judges, write predictions assets.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Out-of-the-box analysis: alternative explanations for any null results, ablation ideas, follow-ups.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Compute metrics, McNemar tests, ECE, judge agreement; write results_summary, results_detailed, plots.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare A/B/C runtime numbers against published baselines surveyed by t0017/t0025.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for next-phase experiments based on RQ1-RQ5 outcomes.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final reporting step: ensure all assets verified, mark task done, prepare PR.
